svg.text: Validate ngay thi co dinh, tao ExamSchedule
Xep hoc vien vao ky thi
Tim EnrollmentForm phu hop ngay thi/ngon ngu
Gan room_id va exam_code theo suc chua
Lay ExamRegistration + ExamRoom neu da publish
Phong thi, so bao danh, trang thai
Danh so tui va ma phach
Cap nhat EnrollmentForm exam_score, level, pass_status
Gui ket qua cho hoc vien
